THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAY, VALOREE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1091 BUSH STREET, #603, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,725.00 RENT, $500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,225.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, S/E MN 3/31/98; IF $575 APR RENT IS PAID BY 5PM 3/31,S/E TIL 4/20/98. EVIC STAYED ON MONTH-TO-MONTH BASIS PROVIDED DEFT PAYS RENT BY 1ST OF MONTH & $100 TOWARDS MONEY JDGMT EVERY 20TH OF MONTH STARTING 4/20 & ENTIRE BAL PAID NLT 12/31/98. IF COMPLIED,PLTF WILL FILE SATIS OF JDGMT & RA WILL BE REINS
